scripts.build: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.config WRANGLER_HOME=.wrangler tsc --noEmit && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.config WRANGLER_HOME=.wrangler vite build
scripts.deploy: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.config WRANGLER_HOME=.wrangler vite build && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.config WRANGLER_HOME=.wrangler wrangler deploy
scripts.db:local: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.config WRANGLER_HOME=.wrangler wrangler d1 migrations apply ente-jobs --local
scripts.db:remote: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.config WRANGLER_HOME=.wrangler wrangler d1 migrations apply ente-jobs
